goal: Построить и проверить base-conditional overlay модели (veto / early-cut / hold-extension) на trade surface immutable базы active-signal-v1@1, чтобы улучшить качество уже существующих сделок без изменения базовой логики.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable: never retune, reselect, or modify base signals, thresholds, hours, days, or execution logic
full-surface directional classification on leadership/breadth/path-asymmetry/regime features is permanently closed (v4–v7 terminal verdict)
CatBoost regression on future PnL is permanently closed
classifier-transition as standalone directional layer is permanently closed
all labels must be frozen before any model training begins
no threshold or feature selection on lockbox window — selection OOS only
all comparisons are matched: same trade window, same notionals, strict overlay evaluation against immutable base
veto route must show signal before opening early-cut; early-cut must show signal before opening hold-extension
all datasets are trade-level (entry-timestamp keyed), not anchor-level

slices.title: Closure-audit v7 и фиксация инвариантов v8
slices.hypothesis: Formally record the terminal verdict of v7 (full-surface directional classification failed), establish the v8 pivot to trade-quality overlays, and lock down the immutable base reference plus research map axes.
slices.objective: Formally record the terminal verdict of v7 (full-surface directional classification failed), establish the v8 pivot to trade-quality overlays, and lock down the immutable base reference plus research map axes.
success_criteria: v8 research_project exists with unique project_id
v7 terminal verdict formally recorded with rationale
immutable reference snapshot frozen and unchangeable
evidence_requirements: v8 research_project exists with unique project_id
v7 terminal verdict formally recorded with rationale
immutable reference snapshot frozen and unchangeable

slices.title: Построить trade-surface atlas immutable base
slices.hypothesis: Build a comprehensive trade-level atlas of every executed base trade over the full available period, capturing side, timing, PnL, path shape, MFE/MAE, and entry context, with stratified breakdowns to identify worst-decile, fragile, and underheld trades.
slices.objective: Build a comprehensive trade-level atlas of every executed base trade over the full available period, capturing side, timing, PnL, path shape, MFE/MAE, and entry context, with stratified breakdowns to identify worst-decile, fragile, and underheld trades.
success_criteria: atlas covers all base trades in available data window with complete fields
long/short split counts and summary statistics computed
worst-decile, fragile, and underheld-winner subsets explicitly identified and tagged
evidence_requirements: atlas covers all base trades in available data window with complete fields
long/short split counts and summary statistics computed
worst-decile, fragile, and underheld-winner subsets explicitly identified and tagged

slices.title: Freeze overlay label contracts
slices.hypothesis: Define and freeze all overlay label schemes (veto, early-cut, extension) with balanced and conservative variants plus an ambiguity policy, before any model training begins.
slices.objective: Define and freeze all overlay label schemes (veto, early-cut, extension) with balanced and conservative variants plus an ambiguity policy, before any model training begins.
success_criteria: all 6 label definitions (2 per route) have explicit positive-class criteria for long and short sides
ambiguity policy documented: near-zero, mixed, and material-improvement thresholds
labels are frozen — no changes allowed after this stage without formal re-open
evidence_requirements: all 6 label definitions (2 per route) have explicit positive-class criteria for long and short sides
ambiguity policy documented: near-zero, mixed, and material-improvement thresholds
labels are frozen — no changes allowed after this stage without formal re-open
